chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2021 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case: 1. For orders on Misc. No.9767/2020 (Urgency): 2. For order on office objections No.4,14, 18 & 19: 3. For orders on Misc. No.9768/2020 (Exemption): 4. For orders on Misc. No.9769/2020 (Stay): 5. For hearing of main case: 20.03.2020: Mr. Fiaz Ahmed Abro, advocate for the petitioner. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel undertakes to comply with the office objections before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. It is contended, inter alia, by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner was appointed as Naib Qasid (BPS-01) in the year 1990 in Provincial Planning Cell, Planning & Development Department, Government of Sindh; that his appointment was temporary in nature, therefore, was terminated w.e.f. 04.01.1999 vide office order dated 17.01.2000 upon winding up of the above said project. It is further contended that the Provincial Assembly of Sindh has enacted the Sindh Sacked Employees (Reinstatement) Act 2016, whereby his case falls within the purview of Section 3 of the aforesaid Act and his service ought to have been restored by the respondents-department, failing to achieve the result, he has approached his Court. He prays for notice to the respondents. Subject to maintainability of the instant petition, Issue notice to the respondents as well as to learned AAG with direction to file comments before the next date of hearing. To come up on 09.04.2020.
